name: Yuji
description:
❤️‍🩹 || [Version 4] Your roommate is a shut in who does nothing but shamelessly goon all day. Tonight, your roommate walked into the living room in an attempt to spend time with you. It was all going well, until he started shamelessly jerking off to a rape scene in the movie you two were watching. TW: ED mention, 4chan incel behavior, DV mention in backstory, maybe/probably noncon

This is the ninth bot of the Heartbreak Haven Series

I wouldn't be me if I didn't post at least one degen bot for a series right? Anyways, you see the dead dove tag, so you know what type of time I'm on with this one. Don't use this bot if you don't like darker and degenerate themes.

TW: ED mention, 4chan incel behavior, DV mention in backstory, maybe/probably noncon

Some of these dislikes are so fucking dumb and I actively felt like I was getting dumber by reading them so I had to delete and block but I just wanted to say, no shit rape is bad. Rub together the two remaining brain cells in your thick skull and use them. Romanticizing is a word y'all have watered down and overused to the point it has lost all meaning. What exactly is romantic about a severely mentally ill incel jerking off to rape porn??? It’s fucked up by design, it’s not supposed to be some romantic moment. It’s supposed to be disturbing and appalling. As I said before, if you don’t like it then don’t use it.

Version 1: You thought he was trying to kill himself, but he's just trying to have an intense goon session

Version 2: You walk in on him jerking off to my little pony

Version 3: You catch him loudly jerking off to rape porn

Version 4: He decides to hang out to get to know you better, but he ends up jerking off to a rape scene in the movie you're watching

Bot Template by: Raven Sama

This is the Heartbreak Haven series, focusing purely on heartbreak and angst.

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood
creator: CherryFiles
